title: Patriots complete trade with Bills, move up in NFL Draft to select offensive tackle Caleb Lomu
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Patriots The Patriots sent the 31st pick and the 125th pick (a fourth-rounder) to the AFC East rival Bills in exchange for the 28th pick.
Utah offensive lineman Caleb Lomu at the NFL rookie combine.
AP Photo/Michael Conroy After much of the local pre-draft debate was whether or not the Patriots would trade out of the first round, New England opted to trade up.

title: ‘She was an incredible person’: With late mother as ongoing inspiration, Payton Tolle is finding himself
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: Boston Red Sox "She always knew the right things to say.
" Payton Tolle continues to lean on his late mother Jina's wisdom.
Courtesy The Tolle Family ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: Mass. fire officials issue alert after e-bike blazes
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News “The lithium-ion batteries in these devices can fail rapidly and violently if they’re damaged, defective, or recalled,” State Fire Marshal Davine said.
Fire officials throughout the state are issuing an alert for electric bike users, after e-bike batteries started fires in two seperate homes on back-to-back days, fire officials said.
Earlier this month, Falmouth fire crews responded to a Club Valley Drive home where a garage was ablaze, the state’s Department of Fire Services wrote in a press release.

title: Anna Maria College announces closure weeks after warnings of financial strain
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Education “We tried to find a way,” school officials said.
“And we are deeply, genuinely sorry we found no viable path forward.
” Anna Maria College will shut down at the end of the 2026 spring semester, school officials said.

title: DNA match found for perpetrator of decades-old murder, rape in Brockton, DA says
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Crime Investigators long knew that the two cases were connected, but were unable to match the DNA sample from the crime scene.
The Plymouth DA announced that the perpetrator of a 1991 murder and 1993 rape in Brockton has been identified.
David L Ryan/The Boston Globe After more than three decades without answers, prosecutors say they’vee identified the perpetrator of a 1991 murder and a 1993 rape, both in Brockton.

title: Mike Vrabel admits he failed to ‘meet the standard that I hold myself to’ in press conference statement
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Patriots "I understand that there are questions, but I take accountability for my actions.
" Mike Vrabel speaks to reporters on April 23.
AP Photo/Kyle Hightower Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel spoke to reporters prior to the start of the NFL Draft on Thursday, acknowledging that he had failed to meet the standard he sets for himself.

title: Mass. fire chief dismissed for alleged conflict of interest, insubordination
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Local News The chief was fired for publicly commenting on safety hazards posed by a solar farm that abuts his property.
By Darin Zullo April 23, 2026 | 7:46 PM 2 minutes to read Rehoboth’s fire chief was fired Tuesday over a conflict of interest and is now reportedly considering taking legal action.

In a 4 to 1 vote by the town’s Board of Selectmen, former Fire Chief Mark Haskell was removed from his position after he spoke out at town meetings about a solar farm across the street from his home, according to WJAR.

title: Group of children hit by car in South End
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News Four children and one adult were treated on scene and taken to a local hospital for further evaluation, police said.
By Carson Lyle April 23, 2026 | 7:03 PM Less than a minute to read ShareSend this article to your social connections.
A group of children were hit by a vehicle Thursday morning while crossing at a Boston intersection, police said.

title: NFL Draft Live Updates: Patriots trade up and take offensive tackle Caleb Lomu at 28
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: New England Patriots The Patriots' pick is in, and they went with an offensive tackle in the first round for the second year in a row.
Caleb Lomu AP Photo/Julio Cortez ShareSend this article to your social connections.

Patriots release statement in support of Mike Vrabel after release of new photos with Dianna Russini WEEI yet again shaking up its lineup for afternoon drive PITTSBURGH -Hello from Acrisure Stadium, where Round 1 of the 2026 NFL Draft is set to begin tonight.

title: 83-year-old killed in Newton crash
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News The two passengers in the struck vehicle did not suffer from "any life-threatening injuries," the local DA said.
By Carson Lyle April 23, 2026 | 6:06 PM Less than a minute to read ShareSend this article to your social connections.
An 83-year-old man was killed Wednesday afternoon in a head-on collision while driving on a Newton road, the local DA said.
